issues.description: Card text describes a triggered effect with conditions, but effects array is empty. Must include OnPlay/trigger logic for DON!! return interaction.
Text states '[Opponent's Turn]' which requires duration:'DuringOpponentTurn', not Permanent or EndOfTurn.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Opponent's Turn] [Once Per Turn] When a DON!! card on your field is returned to your DON!! deck, if your Leader has the {Donquixote Pirates} type, add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and rest it.
